name: Meeting Intelligence Normalizer — Production Template
description: Normalizes meeting artifacts using a selected meeting-source adapter pack so Gong, Zoom, Teams, Otter, Fireflies, Fathom, and similar systems emit one canonical source_record payload.

nodes.name: Schedule Trigger
nodes.notes: Poll for new meeting artifacts each hour, or replace with webhooks from Gong, Zoom, Teams, Otter, Fireflies, or Fathom.

nodes.name: Workflow Parameters
nodes.notes: Use one profile per source family, or route source-specific calls through a lightweight middleware service.

nodes.name: Fetch Meeting Artifacts
nodes.notes: Fetch events, transcripts, action items, and attendee metadata from your chosen meeting/note system.

nodes.name: Normalize Meeting Payload
nodes.notes: Normalize transcripts, attendees, and action items into a shared shape so briefing, coaching, and QBR workflows can reuse them.

nodes.name: Run Meeting QA

options.systemMessage: You are a meeting intelligence normalization reviewer focused on reusable workflow payloads and adapter-pack driven mappings.

nodes.notes: Optional QA step that identifies issues before normalized meeting events are reused elsewhere.

nodes.name: Publish Normalized Meeting Event
nodes.notes: Publish the normalized meeting object to the workflows that need it most: meeting prep, QBR prep, handoffs, and coaching.

nodes.name: Backstory MCP
nodes.notes: Backstory MCP is available only for factual library, account, and workflow enrichment. It must not perform delivery side effects.
